response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally experienced software engineer (20 years, MIT degree, multiple staff-level roles) who meets all minimum requirements. However, for a Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role, the absence of recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, or an AI-related advanced degree is a significant gap. While his recent work on AI-agent infrastructure shows promise, it's too limited in scope and recent (less than 1 year) to establish the deep AI strategy expertise this director-level position requires. He has the engineering foundation to potentially grow into this role but would need substantial additional AI domain expertise.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year experience requirement with 20 years in software engineering and multiple staff-level roles demonstrating technical leadership
MIT Computer Science degree with proven full-stack expertise spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure across diverse languages and technologies
Entrepreneurial background as GISCollective founder and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure show adaptability and openness to emerging domains
concerns: AI expertise is extremely recent (less than 1 year) and limited to infrastructure components (MCP frameworks) rather than strategic AI product development, machine learning, or AI platforms
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field and no demonstrated products, platforms, or significant projects built with AI technology
Career trajectory has been primarily in backend, infrastructure, and full-stack engineering rather than AI strategy, cloud platform evolution, or advising strategic customers on AI technologies
